📖 English

Nouns and Verbs

A fun cartoon explaining nouns and verbs with examples.

📚 Chapter 1 ⏱️ 7 min
🎯

I watched this video!

Tap the button when you are done to earn a sticker!

Nouns and Verbs Cartoon

Meet the noun and verb characters in this cartoon! See how they work together to build sentences.

What You Will Learn

  • What nouns and verbs are
  • How to spot them in a sentence
  • Fun examples to practice

Tip: Shout out the noun and verb every time you see one in the video!

Now go make your own sentences using your favorite nouns and verbs.

#english #grammar
